eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Morris, NJ; at 6:04 PM on JUL 3, 2026 Effective until 12:04 AM JUL 4, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Emergency responders are managing the significant storm impacts with a high volume of 911 calls. We are aware of reports of downed trees, power lines, & damage throughout Morris County. Please call 911 ONLY for life-threatening emergencies or situations involving immediate danger to life or safety.
